presentation.situation: Two heirs split an inheritance. Neither wants to reveal how badly they want each piece — and it has to be legally clean.

Heir 2.blurb: won't accept less than a fair third
redlines: at least a third of the estate

Executor.blurb: won't sign off on anything not legally clean
redlines: the title must be legally clean

grab.plain: One heir grabs 90/10 — title left unclear

presentation.outcome: The split both heirs accept and the executor can legally sign is picked; the 90/10 grab with an unclear title was blocked by a red line. No family fight — and a record everyone can check.
